overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player moves along wooden walkways and covered ramps, passing digital billboards and transitioning from enclosed passages to an open sky garden with views of towering skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden pedestrian walkway with vertical neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden walkway toward the illuminated city center

entered.detail: tall cyan neon light fixture illuminating the left side of the path
tall concrete wall with graffiti running along the right side
planked wooden deck surface with wet reflective finish
distinctive circular structure atop a skyscraper visible in the distance
tall palm trees lining the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow wooden walkway at night, flanked by a glowing vertical neon light on the left and a graffiti-covered concrete wall on the right. Dense palm trees create a canopy overhead as the camera moves forward toward a distant illuminated building complex.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial underpass entrance with food vendors

events.description: approaching the covered underpass with commercial stalls and digital signage

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past a food stall toward the underpass entrance

notable_agents.action: walking ahead of the camera toward the underpass entrance

entered.detail: small commercial stall with illuminated signage and displays
large digital billboards displaying 'El Guapo' advertisements
elevated highway or monorail structure spanning across the path ahead

segments.scene_description: The walkway approaches a commercial zone beneath an overpass, with a food stall appearing on the right and large 'El Guapo' digital billboards on the left. A pedestrian walks ahead toward the underpass as the vertical neon light fades behind and the concrete wall recedes into the mid-ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian ramp with digital advertising displays

events.description: beginning to ascend the inclined ramp under the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking up the inclined ramp under the overpass, surrounded by digital advertisements

entered.detail: enclosed concrete ramp with overhead cover leading upward
wall covered with large illuminated digital advertisements and video screens
underside of the highway overpass forming a concrete ceiling

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a fully enclosed concrete ramp ascending under the overpass. Digital billboards line the right wall while the 'El Guapo' advertisements move closer on the left. The wooden deck gives way to concrete as the path climbs upward through the artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated sky garden walkway with city skyline panorama

events.description: exiting the covered ramp into the open sky garden with panoramic city views

agents.ego_description: walking along the open pathway while observing the surrounding skyscrapers and neon-lit skyline

entered.detail: tiled stone walkway surface replacing the wooden and concrete paths
metal safety railing along the right edge of the elevated path
thick cluster of trees and plants beyond the railing
dense collection of illuminated high-rise towers with holographic displays

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a wide elevated sky garden with panoramic views of the neon-lit city skyline. The path is now paved tile with a metal railing separating it from dense vegetation on the right. Towering skyscrapers with holographic advertisements dominate the left horizon as the camera moves through the open air.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, neon-lit alleyway that gradually ascends into a panoramic elevated sky garden. It begins on a wooden walkway flanked by a glowing vertical light and graffiti-covered walls, moving beneath a canopy of dense palm trees toward a distant building complex. As the path approaches a commercial zone, the environment opens up beneath an overpass where food stalls and large El Guapo digital billboards emerge. The scene then shifts as the wooden deck gives way to a concrete ramp, climbing upward through an enclosed passage lined with artificial lighting and advertisements. Finally, the ramp opens into a wide tiled plaza with metal railings and lush vegetation, revealing a vast skyline of towering skyscrapers and holographic displays under the night sky.
